content_body: My wife and I have stayed for years with Cabin Rentals of Georgia. Our most recent stay was Rustic Elegance. Stunning Cabin. Gary and the team were great hosts, as always. We stay at 5-star locations throughout the US and this compared to the best. I have never been disappointed in my dealings with the team. Can not wait to get back. Thanks again.
title: 5-star Luxury Cabin
